3.修復了某些情況下無法觸發登仙任務劇情的問題
tw.description:
《鬼谷八荒》是一款開放世界的沙盒修仙遊戲。結合了修仙體系與山海經文化背景，體驗從凡人一步步修行成長為強者的過程，與山海經中各種妖、獸戰鬥。你是否能堅守本心，與困難做鬥爭；慎做抉擇，把握自己的命運。
【遁入修仙世界，開啟逆天人生】  
鬼谷八荒，除了財侶法地，還有詭祕莫測的妖獸，危機重重的秘境，難以逾越的天塹，彩光四射的祕寶，等著被人發現。  
你將作為一個煉氣期小修士從愚村出發，修煉，變強，危機中九死一生。每一次突破，你都能逆天改命，助你在旅途上披荊斬棘，跨越五大州，睥睨天下，再闖上天元山，向天道一問。  

【AI互動生態，給NPC完整的一生】  
我們構建了完整的NPC互動生態，他們「生活」在這裡，有自己的朋友親族關係網，自己的人生軌跡，不受玩家的進度限制，除非，你決定出手干涉。  
你可兼濟天下，攜手紅顏；你可獨善其身，快意恩仇；你亦可逆天而行，與全世界為敵。  
和NPC們切磋武藝，傳授道心，拜師學藝，收徒授業。和NPC在拍賣場喊價廝殺，結束後拔刀相向或順手牽羊。你將成為修仙界群像中的一部分，是大放異彩，還是默默修行，皆看你如何選擇。  

【體驗小說橋段，感受奇遇驚喜】  
英雄救美？愛人為你爭風吃醋？五十年之約？捲入神秘組織的明爭暗鬥？遺蹟遇寶？又慘遭奪寶？  
這些都有可能發生在你身上。  
除NPC交互之外，這裡還有豐富的隨機事件以及支線任務，在你的旅途上給予驚喜。它們或許會讓你煩惱，餵你刀子，也可能讓你化險為夷，甚至破而後立。在一步又一步的選擇過程中，你將譜寫只屬於你的，獨一無二的故事。  

【打造最強宗門，攻城略地一統八荒】  
我們構建了宗門的經營玩法，身為弟子、長老以及宗主，將會有不同的體驗。你可以加入大宗門，從最底層的弟子做起，一步步爬上權力的階梯。也可以空降落魄的小宗門，力挽狂瀾，帶領宗門重振雄風。  
弟子可以完成宗門任務，在宗門大比中出戰，或隨同門出征作戰，為宗門積累資源，為宗門贏取榮譽，為宗門擴張土地。  
長老可以管轄門下弟子，傳道授業，分配任務職能，加速宗門成長，在宗門大戰中指導弟子大殺四方。  
宗主則需要統籌全宗的秩序，制定侵略和防守計劃，攻防靈礦等資源點，甚至佔領他人宗門，奪取專屬逆天改命和祕籍。  
一統八荒，只要你有宏圖壯志和鐵腕手段，不再只是幻想。  

【構築獨特流派，挑戰妖獸神仙】  
闖蕩這世界，需要有傍身之技。  
心法築根基，武技/靈技探深淺，身法創機會，絕技造優勢，神通定乾坤。不同祕籍有不同的特性。  
修仙者還有十二大靈根，對應不同的流派，你可以選擇專精一路，或全面發展。十二種靈根都有對應的功法祕籍，排列組合可組成豐富的流派，孰強孰弱，皆由你評斷。  
城鎮琅琊閣、宗門功法閣、秘境、各種任務，甚至路邊一個土坑裡，都可能發現珍奇祕籍，充滿驚喜。  
這個世界上還有上百種珍奇妖獸，無數修仙者、鬼怪、仙人供你檢驗自己的實力。挑戰升仙擂台，衝擊各大洲參玄榜，以此證明自己的實力。你能否踏破冥山的障礙一路向前？構築的流派能否經歷大浪淘沙的檢驗？  

【法寶器靈煉丹畫符，三大神器伴前路】  
練好自身本領，也別忘了外力加持。  
開局三大神器，每一個都會給你帶來一種獨一無二的系統。雙魚佩可以復活自己和選中之人，昊天眼可以偷學妖獸技能，洞察更多訊息，而煉妖壺則可以讓你捕獲BOSS成為你的小跟班，替你戰鬥或派遣尋求寶物。  
除了開局神器之外，你也能煉製你自己的法寶，並收服器靈與你一起戰鬥，此外器靈還會在探索中給予你陪伴，觸發專屬的奇遇等等。  
在這裡，你還可以學習煉丹畫符、堪輿風水，製作幫助你探索世界、整蠱仇人、戰鬥殺敵的種種道具。至於如何發揮它們真正的作用，皆看各位道友如何抉擇。

tw.description:
「Cytus II」是雷亞遊戲繼「Cytus」、「Deemo」及「VOEZ」三款全球音樂遊戲排行榜冠軍作品後，由原班人馬傾注全力打造的音樂節奏遊戲續作。


未來，人類重新定義了網路的發展和連線方式，能夠輕易地在現實世界同步存取網路世界，改變了千年以來生活的樣貌。

在巨型精神網路空間cyTus裡，一位來歷不明的傳奇DJ Æsir，其音樂有著讓人為之瘋狂的魅力，每個音符和節拍都能夠深深重擊聽者的靈魂深處。

某日，從未露面的Æsir突然宣布要舉辦第一場大型虛擬音樂祭——Æsir-FEST，邀請了當紅偶像歌手以及人氣DJ作為開場嘉賓。

宣傳公開之際即造成前所未見的討論熱潮，所有人無不想一睹Æsir的真實面貌。

而在音樂祭入場的前一小時，數以千萬計的連線瀏覽次數打破歷史紀錄，整個城市瞬間沸騰了起來，等待Æsir如同天神般的降臨……

遊戲特色：

-獨特動態判定線音樂遊戲玩法
跟隨判定線打擊拍點以獲得高分，透過五種不同特性的拍點及隨節奏動態變化的判定線，讓遊戲過程更貼合音樂，輕鬆融入並沉浸在樂曲之中。

-50首+IAP(額外付費內容)，超越250首最高質量樂曲
本次收錄樂曲涵蓋世界各地如日韓、歐美、台灣等創作者的作品，透過數位角色引領玩家遊玩如電音、搖滾、古典等不同風格之樂曲，是不辜負千萬人期待的自信力作。

-多達800種不同譜面關卡 
設計超過800種由易到難的音樂譜面，豐富的遊戲內容滿足不同等級的玩家，透過指尖的打擊體驗最刺激的挑戰和樂趣。

-與遊戲中的角色們一同進入虛擬的網路世界探險
獨特的故事系統 "iM" 將帶領玩家與遊戲中的角色逐步拼湊出 「Cytus II」背後的劇情脈絡與世界觀，在極富動態的視覺體驗中揭開故事的真實面貌。

PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ)
NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり)

tw.description:
【遊戲簡介】
《召喚騎士團》是由橄欖熊貓工作室製作的一款RPG卡牌像素風遊戲。 分為《騎士之歌》和《群星之章》兩部分玩法和內容，遊戲透過免費下載內購解鎖的方式取得全部的遊玩內容。

【內購解鎖】
全內容解鎖：8.99USD
騎士之歌劇情模式：4.99USD
群星之章自由模式：4.99USD
兩個模式都支持先體驗再付費解鎖，《騎士之歌》可以免費體驗至第二章節結束，《群星之章》免費體驗遊戲內時間一年。
PS：該金額會根據當地匯率進行換算

《騎士之歌》：
劇情改編自諾貝爾文學獎得主亨里克·顯克微支《十字軍騎士》，主要玩法為卡牌的RPG角色扮演，在卡牌戰鬥的同時加入了夥伴技能連攜系統，將根據玩家打出 的牌釋放不同的專屬技能，從而建構不同的流派。 在遊戲中也會認識並招募到眾多同伴，踏上一段波瀾壯闊的旅程。

《群星之章》：
遊戲的主舞台在一個名為安塔納的魔幻大陸上，在這裡擁有風俗迥異的六個國家，玩家將扮演其中一個王國的小領主。
在魔界即將入侵這片大陸的前夕，玩家需要前往各地尋找自己騎士團的伙伴，建立屬於自己的騎士團，展開冒險，增強自己的實力，守護人類戰線。

【設備支援】
·iOS 10.0及更高版本
·運行記憶體3G以及以上機型
·iphone7 以上機型
·ipad Air3以上機型

【聯絡我們】
遊戲過程中需要協助，或遇到問題，可以通過郵件聯絡反饋。
官方郵箱：knight@longyougame.com

tw.description:
Airport ground maneuvering simulation of more than 40 different airports including 
London Heathrow LHR, Philadelphia PHL, Miami Intl. MIA, Singapore, New York JFK, Las Vegas LAS, São Paulo GRU, Montreal YUL, Boston BOS,  and many more. 

Different versions of airports included:
- Play the simplified version, where the airport is scaled down to an easy playable experience.
- Play the real thing. Here the whole airport is in real size displayed, where all your skills are required.

Features
- Give pushback, taxi, holding and take-off clearances. 
- Handle emergencies and try to release all flights on time in order to release the next level.

From an easy single-runway operation at the beginning to demanding hub airports with multiple active runways where all your skills are required.

[Game Summary]
A Naruto game full of 3D competitive action!
NARUTO: Ultimate Ninja STORM finally makes its way to smartphones!
Experience the stories and battles of Naruto's childhood through beautiful graphics!

Game Content
Ultimate Mission Mode
Relive the stories and famous battles from Naruto's childhood! You can freely move around the Hidden Leaf Village and take on missions and mini games!

Free Battle Mode
In Free Battle Mode, you can choose from 25 unique characters from Naruto's childhood and 10 support characters to enjoy a variety of powerful ninjutsu actions and battles! 

Changes for the App
Easily activate ninjutsu, ultimate jutsu, and other actions with a tap! Even those playing the series for the first time can confidently enjoy the game!
Plus, the following additional features and improvements have made the game easier to play:
- New auto-save feature
- New control mode selection for battle (casual/manual)

us.description:
Train your brain to listen carefully with this professional speech therapy app. Three activities help you to understand sentences, follow directions, and improve language processing. If you’re looking for a speech therapy app for adults and older children with communication and cognitive impairments that takes understanding beyond single words, this app is for you. 

** Try for FREE by downloading Advanced Language Therapy Lite **

Advanced Comprehension Therapy will help you find where comprehension breaks down, then help you build it back up with 3 classic speech therapy activities targeting sentence-level listening and reading comprehension.

1) IDENTIFY the picture that matches the sentence, increasing in syntactic complexity. Start by finding the picture that matches a sentence like “The baby sleeps.” Work up to finding “The grandparent is told a secret by the child” from closely related pictures.

* 11 levels of difficulty for understanding sentences with nearly 700 unique trials
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes up to 3 nouns, indirect objects, reversible sentences, & passives

2) BUILD a sentence by focusing on each word & how they all fit together. Arrange the words one-by-one to match the pictured sentence you hear. Start with 3 words and work up to 9.

* 20 sentence types in nearly 1200 unique trials
* Add up to 3 extra words for an added challenge
* Tricky "little words" like articles, pronouns, and prepositions
* Hear each word as you touch it

3) FOLLOW directions of increasing difficulty in 1-, 2-, & 3-step commands. Start with exercises like “Touch the pencil.” Work up to brain-bending challenges like “Before you touch the large yellow striped circle, touch the small blue solid star.” 

* 16 levels of difficulty for following directions
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes basic, temporal, & conditional commands in a hierarchy of 1-, 2-, & 3-step directions

In All Activities:

* Enjoy 1000’s of unique stimuli with hundreds of photos
* Use hints when you get stuck so you always finish successfully
* Track progress with detailed e-mail reports 
* Record yourself on-screen and send it when you’re finished
* Repeat audio at any time, or repeat slowly for easier understanding
* Designed with adults in mind but easy enough for children to use 
* No subscriptions, no monthly bills, no Wi-Fi needed

-------------------------------------------------
Who is Advanced Comprehension Therapy For?

* Speech-Language Pathologists
* Adults with Aphasia (mild-moderate)
* Stroke & TBI Survivors
* Children with Autism or Language Learning Difficulties
* Anyone who has mastered the single words in Comprehension Therapy or Language 4-in-1 & wants to take their therapy to the next level!

-------------------------------------------------
Which Skills Does This App Target?

* Auditory Comprehension (listening)
* Reading Comprehension 
* Attention to Detail
* Working Memory (holding information)
* Nouns & Pronouns (he/she/it/they)
* Adjectives (colors, size, shading)
* Syntactic Processing (understanding grammar)
* Temporal Concepts (before/after)
* Conditional Directions (if/then)
* Problem Solving (using hint/repeat or fixing errors)

-------------------------------------------------
Download now to get started – or try it for FREE with Advanced Language Therapy Lite!

Looking for something different in a speech therapy app? We offer a wide range to choose from. Find the right one for you at tactustherapy.com/find

us.description:
Aviation Maintenance Tools is a professional maintenance reference app for aircraft technicians, focused on A320 troubleshooting and ECAM reset procedures.
It provides fast, structured access to key information used during fault troubleshooting, reset procedures, structural damage report creation, and everyday maintenance tasks—helping technicians work more efficiently on the line or in base maintenance.

ECAM Fault Messages

• Extensive database of fault messages with the associated circuit breakers (CBs) required for each A320 ECAM reset
• Images of aircraft panels showing where to find each circuit breaker
• Clear, step-by-step ECAM reset procedures with an integrated countdown
• Maintenance manual and MEL references linked to each message

Quick Fault Search

• Instantly find messages using a fast search engine, reducing time-consuming searches during line maintenance calls
• Browse messages organized by ATA chapter
• Recent tab for quick access to previously viewed content

Structural Damage Reports

• Interactive structural damage report forms generator with support for multiple damage entries, eliminating paper notes and improving handover
• Useful for reporting a single damage or multiple damages (e.g., after lightning events)
• Attach damage photos taken with the device camera
• Export reports to PDF or ZIP files (including images) to continue working on a computer or another phone with the app

Alpha Callups

• Complete list of Alpha Callups, filtered by engine model
• Built-in search engine for quick searches

Electrical Contacts

• Electrical contacts, terminals, and splices part numbers library, with quick search function
• Direct reference to the ESPM figure where each item is located
• Crimping and insertion/extraction references included

Common Part Numbers

• Commonly used aircraft part numbers organized by category and aircraft zone
• Each part number can include a description and photos
• Add your own part numbers with photos taken using the device camera
• Create and share your custom part-number list with colleagues
• Useful for quickly finding references during line maintenance

Maintenance Manual References

• Structured breakdown of the maintenance manual index
• Fast search for quick lookup

Disclaimer – Training & Reference Use Only

This app is designed for training, reference, and informational purposes only.
This app does not replace official documentation. Fault messages, reset procedures, structural damage reports, manual/MEL/ESPM references, electrical contact data, and part number information are provided as a learning aid for maintenance technicians.
Users must always consult the latest official manuals and procedures before performing any maintenance or operational task on an aircraft.
This app must not be used as the sole source for maintenance decisions.

This app is not affiliated with, endorsed by, sponsored by, or an official product of any aircraft manufacturer.
The app does not copy, reproduce, or distribute proprietary manufacturer materials (including manual pages or documentation) and does not use manufacturer logos or branding.

us.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

us.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

us.description:
One of the best hack-and-slash games of all time now fits in your pocket!

Originally released on PC in 2006, Titan Quest is an action RPG set against a mythological backdrop. The Titans have escaped from prison and are hell-bent on destroying the Earth. The Gods alone can’t stop them -- a hero is needed to lead this epic struggle. Victory or defeat will determine humanity’s fate and that of the Olympians.

You are that hero! Create your character, explore ancient civilizations like Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China, and fight against hordes of legendary creatures! Master the arts of archery, swordsmanship or magic and upgrade your character to unlock awesome powers! Discover special items to help you complete your quest: legendary swords, devastating thunderbolts, enchanted bows, and much more!

Specially adapted for mobile devices, this new version offers numerous new features:

● A new touch-friendly interface 
● Completely redesigned touch-friendly gameplay 
● High-quality graphics
● A huge, open world to explore
● Full day/night cycle
● 80 different mythological creatures: Minotaurs, Cyclopses, Gorgons, and many more
● 1200+ items to discover
● 30 different character classes 
● 150 different character skills
● Colossal playtime of more than 60 hours 
● Scalable difficulty modes:  weapons and enemies match your skill level 
● Dozens of unlockable achievements to discover
● No ads, no microtransactions. 

Mixing ancient mythology with non-stop action, Titan Quest is a classic hack-and-slash offering energizing gameplay with a fast, intense rhythm. Overcome thrilling challenges and vanquish the greatest enemies ever to invade the mobile world!

DLCs available as in-app purchase: 
● IMMORTAL THRONE - Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx to conquer this dark new adventure.
● RAGNARÖK - In the uncharted lands of northern Europe, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!
● ATLANTIS - Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. Including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!
● ETERNAL EMBERS - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

Plant grass, flowers, trees and shear your animals’ different-colored wool to stock up your resources! Collect happy stars, harvest wood and flower petals and use them to provide your flock with food, accessories, toys and more! Control the clouds and make it rain to ensure your sheep never run out of fresh water to drink. If your sheep feel happy and content, they’ll bring tiny lambs into the world!

Every single animal is asking for your attention! The fluffy balls of wool love to be entertained. Customize your flock’s pasture with fun objects and choose between different settings like the Wild West or Pirate scenery. Watch your flock run around by day and sleep by the cozy campfire at night. us.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

The paid DLC “The End Of Karma” is now available! A massive update that unveils the final chapter of the story, and the decisive battle against the ancient god He Luo!

【v3.1.2 Patch Notes】
*Please install the game directly and do not uninstall the old version, otherwise you will lose your local save files! It is recommended to use the cloud save function for backup~
*The offline feature is now available. You will only need to complete the login verification after the initial game installation. Subsequently, you are able to play in the offline mode.

-----------The following is the content of this update----------

DLC “The End Of Karma”: 
For ten years, 'Bi-an' slumbered in a dream of ashes while the malevolent Heluo deity was fully unleashed, turning the world into chaos. Under the arduous support of Linglong and others, the Heluo Resistance once saw a glimmer of hope, but everything seemed so fragile in the face of madness and despair… 
Now, 'Bi-an' has awakened from the endless nightmare and returned to the real world. He will embark on his journey once more, initiating the ultimate battle.

 【New Chapters】Five New Chapters, Intense Boss Challenges 
Five brand new chapters will lead you through a world that is both familiar and strange, gradually approaching the sacred grounds of the Snake Dynasty, hidden deep within the earth’s core a thousand years ago. Six formidable end-of-chapter Bosses will present new challenges to players! 

【New Sects】Three New Sects, Smooth Combat Experience
 Three new sects are introduced: Wheels of Solar and Lunar, Underworld Vidyaraja, and Soul Blade Shura, along with six sect skills, offering players a novel combat experience! 

【New Talents】System of All Things, Free Talisman Matching 
A new talent tree system allows limited talent points to dictate your growth strategy and choices, and an Infinite Mode that breaks through all limits! Coupled with the special rune - Time Talisman, the diverse entries and effects provide greater freedom and intensity for build combinations. 

【New Story】Abundant Story Segments, Three Endings for Your Choices 
The might of the ancient gods is not easily extinguished; your decisions will lead to three distinct endings! Traverse timelines, face various challenges, and find a way to save everyone! 

【New Adaptation】Mobile-Exclusive Features 
A new “Automatically activate Sword Sheathing” feature has been added for enhanced gameplay smoothness.
us.description:
While the rich stinks of meat and wine, the bones of the poor litter the roadside.
Great injustice often leads to strange occurrences
Snow in July can only be remedied through blood.

Warm Snow is a Roguelike action game with a background set in a dark fantasy world, where the eerie 'Warm Snow' holds sway. You will play as the Warrior 'Bi-an' on a crusade against the Five Great Clans, in order to save a world teetering on the brink of destruction.

【A Dark Tale of Sword and Snow】
A strange phenomenon appeared during the 27th Year of the Longwu Era. Snow fell from the sky, which was warm rather than cold to the touch, and did not melt.
People who breathed in the 'Warm Snow' lost their minds and became monsters. This phenomenon was later known as 'Warm Snow'.
Embark on a journey as Warrior 'Bi-an' to search for the truth behind the 'Warm Snow' and put an end to the this never-ending darkness.

【Countless Combinations】
Seven sects, varied Relics, unpredictable excaliburs, the game is full of Rogue-like elements which will keep each challenge in your journey fresh and unique.
Each time you venture into the world would be a whole-new experience, pick your favorite playing style and challenge yourself.

【Thrilling Flying Sword System】
Perform critical destruction with swords that flicker between shadow and light. Control your flying swords with different attributes, attack modes and Relic boosts.

【Reincarnate and Collect the Fragments of Truth】
You decide how you will grow stronger!
Boost your abilities with talent points that you can assign at will.
The truth about this world is hidden in the randomly dropped 'Memory Fragments'.
Are you ready to discover the secrets behind the Five Great Clans and reveal the truth of this world?

【Mobile Version Optimizations】
· Button customization and Auto-Dash: Adjust the position and size of buttons according to your preferences. Enable the Auto-Dash feature to start auto dashing with the left joystick.
· Adjust the viewing distance freely: Adjust the size of the screen display according to your preferences.
· Auto Enemy Tracking: Enable the Auto Enemy Tracking feature for a silky smooth combat experience.

Minimum device requirement: iOS 12.0 or higher. Memory requirement: 4GB. Available RAM: 4GB

us.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster-Catching games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

us.description:
Tale of Immortal is an open-world sandbox based on Chinese mythology and cultivation. You will grow to become immortal, conquer the beasts from the Classic of Mountains and Season, make your choices carefully and grasp your own destiny.
【Ascend to the Top with Immortal Cultivation A Journey of a Lifetime】
Step into the enchanting world of the Tale of Immortal, where cultivation is an art that requires more than just financial means and help from fellow cultivators. To truly master it, one must possess a deep understanding of the craft and have access to the right cultivation venues. But that's not all—the journey is fraught with danger, as you'll face unpredictable monsters, crisis-ridden mystic realms, insurmountable barriers, and brilliant treasures waiting to be discovered.
【NPCs with a Life of Their Own AI-Driven Interactive Ecology】
Embrace a fully-realized NPC world, where each character is a unique entity with their own friends, family, and life trajectory— completely independent of your progress. However, if you choose to meddle, you certainly can!
【Surprising Encounters Await Experience a Fascinating Story】
Are you ready to embark on a thrilling adventure? One where you might become the hero who saves the day and wins the heart of the love of your life? Or maybe you're looking to stir up some jealousy in your crush and have them fight for your affection? How about fulfilling a fifty-year-old promise or getting caught up in the struggle of a mysterious organization? Perhaps you'll uncover a long-forgotten treasure, only to have it snatched away by a cunning adversary?
【From Conquering the Territories to Uniting the World Building the Strongest Sect】
Do you want to take your sect to new heights of power and glory? We've got the ultimate sect management gameplay that lets you experience the full range of sect life: from humble disciple to mighty sect master. Join a massive sect and work your way up from the bottom, or take on the challenge of leading a fallen sect back to prominence.
【Martial Arts, Monsters, and Immortals Building Your Unique School】
To embark on an epic adventure, you need to hone your skills and become a true warrior.

Start by building a solid foundation of cultivation. Your mind skills are crucial to success, so focus on cultivating a powerful mindset. From there, you can delve into martial and spiritual skills to take your abilities to the next level. As you explore, keep an eye out for opportunities to create edges with your motion and special skills. And don't forget to tap into your ultimate skills to save the day when necessary.
【The Triad of Power Artifact, Alchemy, and Talismans】
Sharpen your skills and harness the power of tools!

At the start, you get to choose from three formidable weapons, each offering a distinct cultivation system. The Bagua Jade grants you the ability to revive yourself and your chosen ally, the Eye of Providence allows you to steal Beast Skills and gain unparalleled insights into the world, and the Mythical Gourd empowers you to capture a Boss and enlist it as your loyal sidekick: command it to fight by your side or to search for treasure on your behalf.

us.description:
"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. 

In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. 

In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in 
the depths of their souls. 

One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. 

On the day of the FEST,  millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started,  the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies...

Game Features:

- The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle
Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. 

- A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP)
The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations.

- Over 800 different charts
Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. 

- Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters
The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. 

PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka)
NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori)
Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki)

us.description:
'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases.




【In-App Purchases】

Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD
Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD
Both modes support free trial before purchase. 
'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year.
Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates.




Song of the Knights:
This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure.




Shining Stars:

Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity.




【Device Support】
iOS 10.0 or later
Devices with 3GB RAM or more
iPhone 7 or newer
iPad Air 3 or newer





【Contact Us】
If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email.
Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

tr.description:
Train your brain to listen carefully with this professional speech therapy app. Three activities help you to understand sentences, follow directions, and improve language processing. If you’re looking for a speech therapy app for adults and older children with communication and cognitive impairments that takes understanding beyond single words, this app is for you. 

** Try for FREE by downloading Advanced Language Therapy Lite **

Advanced Comprehension Therapy will help you find where comprehension breaks down, then help you build it back up with 3 classic speech therapy activities targeting sentence-level listening and reading comprehension.

1) IDENTIFY the picture that matches the sentence, increasing in syntactic complexity. Start by finding the picture that matches a sentence like “The baby sleeps.” Work up to finding “The grandparent is told a secret by the child” from closely related pictures.

* 11 levels of difficulty for understanding sentences with nearly 700 unique trials
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes up to 3 nouns, indirect objects, reversible sentences, & passives

2) BUILD a sentence by focusing on each word & how they all fit together. Arrange the words one-by-one to match the pictured sentence you hear. Start with 3 words and work up to 9.

* 20 sentence types in nearly 1200 unique trials
* Add up to 3 extra words for an added challenge
* Tricky "little words" like articles, pronouns, and prepositions
* Hear each word as you touch it

3) FOLLOW directions of increasing difficulty in 1-, 2-, & 3-step commands. Start with exercises like “Touch the pencil.” Work up to brain-bending challenges like “Before you touch the large yellow striped circle, touch the small blue solid star.” 

* 16 levels of difficulty for following directions
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes basic, temporal, & conditional commands in a hierarchy of 1-, 2-, & 3-step directions

In All Activities:

* Enjoy 1000’s of unique stimuli with hundreds of photos
* Use hints when you get stuck so you always finish successfully
* Track progress with detailed e-mail reports 
* Record yourself on-screen and send it when you’re finished
* Repeat audio at any time, or repeat slowly for easier understanding
* Designed with adults in mind but easy enough for children to use 
* No subscriptions, no monthly bills, no Wi-Fi needed

-------------------------------------------------
Who is Advanced Comprehension Therapy For?

* Speech-Language Pathologists
* Adults with Aphasia (mild-moderate)
* Stroke & TBI Survivors
* Children with Autism or Language Learning Difficulties
* Anyone who has mastered the single words in Comprehension Therapy or Language 4-in-1 & wants to take their therapy to the next level!

-------------------------------------------------
Which Skills Does This App Target?

* Auditory Comprehension (listening)
* Reading Comprehension 
* Attention to Detail
* Working Memory (holding information)
* Nouns & Pronouns (he/she/it/they)
* Adjectives (colors, size, shading)
* Syntactic Processing (understanding grammar)
* Temporal Concepts (before/after)
* Conditional Directions (if/then)
* Problem Solving (using hint/repeat or fixing errors)

-------------------------------------------------
Download now to get started – or try it for FREE with Advanced Language Therapy Lite!

Looking for something different in a speech therapy app? We offer a wide range to choose from. Find the right one for you at tactustherapy.com/find

It features a dark storyline, intense action, and a mystical journey into a dead, smoldering world.

tr.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.

tr.description:
A new evolution of match-3, combat, and adventure!
Hero Emblems II is a JRPG that combines elements of side-scrollers and match-3 games. Players control members of the Night Chasers, a group of heroic warriors, as they embark on an adventure to save their lands from an evil threat.

[Game Features]
◆ Thrilling match-3 battle experiences
Match three Emblems to clear them from the board and make your heroes attack. Clear four or more to generate Magic Emblems, allowing your heroes to unleash powerful skills. Perform combos to launch even more powerful attacks and vanquish your enemies!

◆ Traditional JRPG experience
In a world of magic and swordplay, players will control members of the Night Chasers as they embark on an adventure together. Enter deep caves, explore ancient ruins, unlock treasure chests, fight against ferocious monsters, upgrade your equipment in town, and gain new information from villagers in the local taverns. A exciting RPG experience is waiting for you in Hero Emblems II!

◆ Substitute Heroes
Each Hero possesses their own unique skills and backstory. There's Zack, the Human Warrior; Lucien, the Marten Knight; Sid, the Felinian Black Mage; Abner the Bard, and many more! Lead your favorite heroes into battle!

◆ Thrilling Japanese character voices in battles
Personalized character voices make combat a thrilling, intense and fun experience!

◆ More equipment
Enemies attack with a wide range of debuffs such as Poison, Ignition, Petrification or Curses. To fight against these tough opponents, you will need to choose your Heroes'  weapons and armor carefully, and make good use of accessories to resist enemy debuffs and boost your Heroes' abilities!

◆'Food Consumption System' for Enhancing Battle Power
A hero's adventure is always brimming with all sorts of challenges. Vicious monsters boast tremendous strength and always catch people off guard with their varied attack styles. Now, heroes can boost their abilities by indulging in delightful delicacies, allowing them to thwart monster attacks with a more refreshing rhythm!

◆One-time payment, IAP-free, and ad-free


A New Chapter in the Night Chasers' History
A long time ago, there was a mercenary group known as the Night Chasers. Instead of making money, these heroic warriors went around helping those in need. During the war, they helped a great many people who were suffering under tyranny and injustice. However, in the ensuing age of peace, the Night Chasers were no longer needed, and were forced to disband. Years later, four young people - Zack, Lucien, Sid, and Odelia - decided to carry on their legacy, forming the new Night Chasers.

One day, Zack and his party save an Elven girl named Dolores. Suffering from amnesia, Dolores cannot remember why she has ventured so far from the Elven Kingdom – only that she has been sent on an urgent quest. Concerned for her well-being, the Night Chasers take her into their fold, leading them to discover an ancient and terrible threat to the kingdom...

** Recommend to use iPhone 6/iPad min4/iPad Air2/iPad 5th Gen./iPad Pro or later devices for better experiences.**

tr.description:
One of the best hack-and-slash games of all time now fits in your pocket!

Originally released on PC in 2006, Titan Quest is an action RPG set against a mythological backdrop. The Titans have escaped from prison and are hell-bent on destroying the Earth. The Gods alone can’t stop them -- a hero is needed to lead this epic struggle. Victory or defeat will determine humanity’s fate and that of the Olympians.

You are that hero! Create your character, explore ancient civilizations like Greece, Egypt, Babylon, and China, and fight against hordes of legendary creatures! Master the arts of archery, swordsmanship or magic and upgrade your character to unlock awesome powers! Discover special items to help you complete your quest: legendary swords, devastating thunderbolts, enchanted bows, and much more!

Specially adapted for mobile devices, this new version offers numerous new features:

● A new touch-friendly interface 
● Completely redesigned touch-friendly gameplay 
● High-quality graphics
● A huge, open world to explore
● Full day/night cycle
● 80 different mythological creatures: Minotaurs, Cyclopses, Gorgons, and many more
● 1200+ items to discover
● 30 different character classes 
● 150 different character skills
● Colossal playtime of more than 60 hours 
● Scalable difficulty modes:  weapons and enemies match your skill level 
● Dozens of unlockable achievements to discover
● No ads, no microtransactions. 

Mixing ancient mythology with non-stop action, Titan Quest is a classic hack-and-slash offering energizing gameplay with a fast, intense rhythm. Overcome thrilling challenges and vanquish the greatest enemies ever to invade the mobile world!

DLCs available as in-app purchase: 
● IMMORTAL THRONE - Encounter the greatest villains of Greek mythology, brave the attacks of Cerberus, and hazard the banks of the River Styx to conquer this dark new adventure.
● RAGNARÖK - In the uncharted lands of northern Europe, you’ll brave the realms of the Celts, the Northmen, and the Asgardian gods!
● ATLANTIS - Set out on a journey across the western Mediterranean, in search of the mythical kingdom of Atlantis. Including the Tartarus Arena for epic battles!
● ETERNAL EMBERS - Summoned by the legendary Emperor Yao, the Hero is called back into the East to deal with a demonic threat that has been ravaging the land after the Telkine was slain.

In this eagerly anticipated sequel of the game “Clouds & Sheep”, the cute sheep are finally on the loose again! Solve countless quests and fulfill your wooly friends’ needs. Plant grass, flowers, trees and shear your animals’ different-colored wool to stock up your resources! Collect happy stars, harvest wood and flower petals and use them to provide your flock with food, accessories, toys and more! Control the clouds and make it rain to ensure your sheep never run out of fresh water to drink. If your sheep feel happy and content, they’ll bring tiny lambs into the world!

Every single animal is asking for your attention! The fluffy balls of wool love to be entertained. Make your sheep jump and use different toys like the trampoline, the seesaw and the swing to actively play with them! Watch your pets interact with each other and observe their reactions to the objects you give to them! Customize your flock’s pasture with fun objects and choose between different settings like the Wild West or Pirate scenery. Watch your flock run around by day and sleep by the cozy campfire at night. Do everything you can to keep your sheep happy and healthy to prevent them from becoming big, cottony clouds in the sky.

Build jousting fields, taverns, marketplaces and beautify your city with impressive statues, magnificent monuments, and lush gardens. But there are also dangers lurking close by. Bandits are in the area, looking to plunder and pillage your peaceful town. Build barracks, guard towers and recruit brave soldiers to protect your citizens from harm. You rule the whole empire from your castle and make sure your inhabitants have fun and stay happy!

FEATURES

tr.description:
"If you've not already played this brilliant, heart-wrenching game, then mobile is as good a place as any to let it completely destroy you." - , 9/10, Pocket Gamer UK

"This War of Mine isn’t exactly “fun,” but it’s definitely a game worth playing." , 9/10, 148apps

"I'm really excited to go home and download 11 bit studios' title on my iPad" , Game Informer

In This War Of Mine you do not play as an elite soldier, rather a group of civilians trying to survive in a besieged city; struggling with lack of food, medicine and constant danger from snipers and hostile scavengers. The game provides an experience of war seen from an entirely new angle. 

The pace of This War of Mine is imposed by the day and night cycle. During the day snipers outside stop you from leaving your refuge, so you need to focus on maintaining your hideout: crafting, trading and taking care of your survivors. At night, take one of your civilians on a mission to scavenge through a set of unique locations for items that will help you stay alive. 

Make life-and-death decisions driven by your conscience. Try to protect everybody from your shelter or sacrifice some of them for longer-term survival. During war, there are no good or bad decisions; there is only survival. The sooner you realize that, the better.

This War of Mine: Anniversary Edition
It's been two years since This War of Mine global release and we're still expanding the experience. This new free DLC, created especially for the Anniversary Edition, adds new characters, new locations to explore, and most importantly - a whole new ending, leading to a different outcome to the game. The dilemma though remains the same – how far will you go, to protect the ones you care about? 

Key Features:
• Inspired by real-life events 
• Control your survivors and manage your shelter 
• Craft weapons, alcohol, beds or stoves – anything that helps you survive 
• Make decisions - an often unforgiving and emotionally difficult experience 
• Randomized world and characters every time you start a new game 
• Charcoal-stylized aesthetics to complement the game's theme

This War of Mine experience is now broadened with "The Little Ones" expansion. "The Little Ones" explores the hardships of wartime survival as seen from an entirely new perspective―that of a child. This DLC puts you in charge of a group of adults and children stuck in a besieged city, struggling with basic necessities. TWoM: The Little Ones focuses not only on the reality of enduring war, but also on how even in times of conflict, kids are still kids: they laugh, cry, play, and see the world differently. In addition to thinking about survival, you'll have to summon your inner child to understand how to protect the little ones. Their youth, and their future, are in your hands.

• Experience the biggest expansion to This War of Mine
• Protect innocent children
• Craft toys, play with kids, and be the caretaker they need
• Meet new adult civilians in scenarios with children

PLEASE NOTE: This game is optimized for latest devices. While playing on older devices such as iPhone 4s or iPad 2 you might experience lower frame rates.

tr.description:
PowNap is a smart power-nap app for Apple Watch.  
It uses your heart rate to detect recovery and wake you at the right moment.

Wake up when your body is ready — not when a timer ends.

You start the nap.  
PowNap handles detection and wake-up based on your physiology.

Two Modes

Power Nap  
15, 20, or 25 minutes  
• May end earlier if your body recovers  
• Ends at the selected time at the latest  

Infinity  
No fixed duration  
• Ends when your body shows signs of recovery or light sleep  
• Ideal when you don’t want a fixed limit  

Calm. Precise. Distraction-free.

• Detects relaxation via heart rate  
• Wakes you with gentle vibration  
• No countdown pressure  
• Subtle progress indicators designed to reduce timer pressure  
• Runs fully offline on your Apple Watch  

Tap “Start” — PowNap takes care of the rest.

Adjustable

• Vibration strength  
• Sensitivity  
• Custom nap durations  

Private & Local

• One-time purchase — no subscription  
• No ads, no account, no tracking  

All processing happens on your watch.

Apple Health access is required to read your heart rate.  
PowNap uses a “Mind & Body” workout for this.

Important

• Not a medical device  
• Uses a “Mind & Body” workout for heart-rate tracking (required by watchOS)  
• Activity Rings may be affected  

Buy once.  
No conditions.  
Just calm, focused recovery.

Apple Watch Compatibility

Requires Apple Watch Series 4 or newer (including SE).  
Apple Watch Series 3 and earlier are not supported.

tr.description:
Run Japan's trains!

No railroad knowledge is required to play "Tokyo Train!".
This game is a brain game with simple rules but requires a lot of brain power.


Customers are waiting at the station for the trains to arrive to take them to their destinations.
Start the trains and transport your customers.

You will earn money for every passenger who boards a train.
Adjust the interval between runs and the number of cars to achieve the highest revenue.
Departing trains costs money. If you send out too many trains and the boarding rate drops, you will lose your revenue.

The operation method is very easy and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, express fares will also appear.

No technical knowledge is required at all.
Both people who like trains and people who like games can quickly understand and enjoy the game.

There are no in-app purchases. There are no ads.
Please concentrate on the game.
Share your operating results on social media.

tr.description:
Run Japanese trains!

・Simple brain game
"Tokyo Train! 2" is a brain game with simple rules. No expertise required.
Train fans, game fans, everyone can enjoy it.

・To everyone who will become a train dispatcher
In the morning in Japan, customers are waiting for the arrival of the train to go to work.
Let's start the train and transport the customers.

・Goal of the game
Japanese railway companies are for-profit organizations. Let's aim for high operating profit!

・How to make profit
Fare revenue - Departure cost = Operating profit.

Fare revenue is generated when passengers board at a station.
Example) If two passengers board a train at a station with a fare of 20, the company receives 40.

Departure costs are charged according to the number of cars when the train departs.
Example) 30 for a 2-car train, 40 for a 4-car train, and 70 for a 10-car train.

One person can ride in one car.
Fare revenue is generated when customers board the train.
Adjust the driving schedule and the number of vehicles to aim for the highest profit.
Departure costs. If you run too many trains and the occupancy rate drops, you'll lose revenue.

・How to operate
The game is very easy to operate and the rules are simple.
All you have to do is adjust the number of train cars and make the trains depart at the best time.
As the game progresses, various variations such as express trains and transfer stations will appear.

・Volume
Enjoy over 50 routes.
Please experience the wide variety of transportation strategies of Japanese railway companies.
No ads, no charges.

Please concentrate on the game. Children can also enjoy the game.

tr.description:
Join millions of players in this pocket monster game sequel
Embark on an epic adventure in EvoCreo 2, the ultimate monster-catching RPG set in the captivating world of Shoru. Immerse yourself in a land teeming with mythical creatures called Creo. For thousands of years, these collectible monsters have roamed the lands, their origins and evolution shrouded in mystery. Do you have what it takes to unravel the secrets of the Creo and become a legendary Evoking Master Trainer?

Uncover a Compelling Adventure Game
Begin your role playing game (RPG) journey as a new recruit in the Shoru Police Academy. Creo Monsters are disappearing, and it's your mission to uncover the truth behind these mysterious events. But there's more to the story than meets the eye in this monster game — dark plots are brewing, and your skills will be put to the test. Along the way, assist the citizens of Shoru by completing over 50 engaging missions, building alliances, and discovering hidden treasures.

Capture and Train Over 300 Monsters
Love monster-collecting games? Build your RPG dream team of Creo in this open-world role playing game. Hunt rare and legendary monsters, each available in unique alternate colors. With over 300 unique monsters to capture, evolve, and train, you’ll have endless possibilities to customize your strategy in pocket monster games. Create powerful combinations and lead your Creo to victory in thrilling turn-based battles.

Explore this monster adventure game
Experience more than 30 hours of offline and online rpg gameplay as you dive into a richly detailed open world. From dense forests to mysterious caves and bustling towns, the continent of Shoru is filled with secrets waiting to be uncovered. Adventure through diverse environments, complete challenging quests, and uncover hidden paths to legendary treasures. Explore 2 more biomes in this sequel like the desert and find many monsters on the way of your adventure. 

Master a deep and strategic RPG battle system as a monster trainer & hunter
Prepare for trainer battles with a highly customizable system. Equip your Creo with items and unlock over 100 unique traits to enhance their abilities. Train your Creo to learn and master over 200 moves, which you can swap anytime to adapt to new challenges. Face fierce opponents, manage elemental weaknesses, and use your tactical skills to gain the upper hand. Can you become a pocket monster master trainer?

Prove Yourself as the Ultimate Master Trainer
Challenge the strongest monster trainers across Shoru and rise through the ranks in this paid role playing game. Compete in the prestigious Coliseum, where only the best monster trainers are crowned as champions. Will you conquer every rpg battle and claim the title of Evoking Master Trainer?

Key Features:
- Sequel of one of the top paid role playing games worldwide
- 300+ collectible monsters to capture, train, and evolve.
- No level cap on your monsters - engaging endgame!
- A sprawling open world with 30+ hours of offline & online gameplay.
- Engaging turn-based battles with deep strategy elements.
- Hundreds of moves and traits to customize your Creo.
- Over 50 missions packed with adventure and rewards.
- Offline play—no internet required to enjoy the game.
- Stunning pixel art visuals reminiscent of classic monster RPGs.

Why Players Love EvoCreo 2:
Fans of Monster games and monster trainer RPGs will feel right at home.
A perfect mix of creature collection, exploration, and battle strategy.
Casual and hardcore gamers alike will enjoy the mix of action and adventure.

Join the adventure today and start your journey toward becoming the ultimate monster trainer in EvoCreo 2! Can you catch them all and master the secrets of the Creo?

tr.description:
Tale of Immortal is an open-world sandbox based on Chinese mythology and cultivation. You will grow to become immortal, conquer the beasts from the Classic of Mountains and Season, make your choices carefully and grasp your own destiny.
【Ascend to the Top with Immortal Cultivation A Journey of a Lifetime】
Step into the enchanting world of the Tale of Immortal, where cultivation is an art that requires more than just financial means and help from fellow cultivators. To truly master it, one must possess a deep understanding of the craft and have access to the right cultivation venues. But that's not all—the journey is fraught with danger, as you'll face unpredictable monsters, crisis-ridden mystic realms, insurmountable barriers, and brilliant treasures waiting to be discovered.
【NPCs with a Life of Their Own AI-Driven Interactive Ecology】
Embrace a fully-realized NPC world, where each character is a unique entity with their own friends, family, and life trajectory— completely independent of your progress. However, if you choose to meddle, you certainly can!
【Surprising Encounters Await Experience a Fascinating Story】
Are you ready to embark on a thrilling adventure? One where you might become the hero who saves the day and wins the heart of the love of your life? Or maybe you're looking to stir up some jealousy in your crush and have them fight for your affection? How about fulfilling a fifty-year-old promise or getting caught up in the struggle of a mysterious organization? Perhaps you'll uncover a long-forgotten treasure, only to have it snatched away by a cunning adversary?
【From Conquering the Territories to Uniting the World Building the Strongest Sect】
Do you want to take your sect to new heights of power and glory? We've got the ultimate sect management gameplay that lets you experience the full range of sect life: from humble disciple to mighty sect master. Join a massive sect and work your way up from the bottom, or take on the challenge of leading a fallen sect back to prominence.
【Martial Arts, Monsters, and Immortals Building Your Unique School】
To embark on an epic adventure, you need to hone your skills and become a true warrior.

Start by building a solid foundation of cultivation. Your mind skills are crucial to success, so focus on cultivating a powerful mindset. From there, you can delve into martial and spiritual skills to take your abilities to the next level. As you explore, keep an eye out for opportunities to create edges with your motion and special skills. And don't forget to tap into your ultimate skills to save the day when necessary.
【The Triad of Power Artifact, Alchemy, and Talismans】
Sharpen your skills and harness the power of tools!

At the start, you get to choose from three formidable weapons, each offering a distinct cultivation system. The Bagua Jade grants you the ability to revive yourself and your chosen ally, the Eye of Providence allows you to steal Beast Skills and gain unparalleled insights into the world, and the Mythical Gourd empowers you to capture a Boss and enlist it as your loyal sidekick: command it to fight by your side or to search for treasure on your behalf.

tr.description:
"Cytus II" is a music rhythm game created by Rayark Games. It's our fourth rhythm game title, following the footsteps of three global successes, "Cytus", "DEEMO" and "VOEZ". This sequel to "Cytus" brings back the original staff and is a product of hardwork and devotion. 

In the future, humans have redefined internet development and connections. We can now easily sync the real world with the internet world, changing life as we have known for thousands of years. 

In the mega virtual internet space cyTus, there exists a mysterious DJ legend Æsir. His music has an irresistible charm; people fall madly in love with his music. Rumor has it that every note and beat of his music hits the audiences in 
the depths of their souls. 

One day, Æsir, who had never shown his face before, suddenly announced that he will be holding the first mega virtual concert —— Æsir-FEST and will invite a top idol singer and a popular DJ as opening performances. The instant the ticket sales began, an unprecedented rush occurred. Everyone wanted to see Æsir's real face. 

On the day of the FEST,  millions of people were connected to the event. At one hour before the event started,  the previous world record for most simultaneous connection was smashed. The whole city was on its feet, waiting for Æsir to descent from the skies...

Game Features:

- The unique "Active Judgement Line" rhythm game playstyle
Tap the notes as the judgement line hits them to achieve a high score. Through five different kinds of notes and the judgement line that actively adjusts its speed according to the beat, the gameplay experience is further combined with the music. Players can easily immerse themselves in the songs. 

- A total of 250+ high-quality songs (50+ in base game, 200+ as IAP)
The game includes songs by composers from all across the world, Japan, Korea, the US, Europe, Taiwan and more. Through the characters, players get to play songs from different genres including but not limited to: electronic, rock and classical. We are confident that this game will live up to the hype and expectations.

- Over 800 different charts
Over 800 different charts designed, from easy to hard. The rich game content can satisfy players of different levels. Experience exciting challenges and enjoyment through the sensation of your fingertips. 

- Explore the virtual internet world with the game's characters
The one-of-a-kind story system "iM" will lead the players and the in-game characters to slowly piece together the story and world behind "Cytus II". Reveal the truth of the story with a rich, cinematic visual experience. 

PAFF (CV:上坂すみれ Sumire Uesaka)
NEKO (CV:花守ゆみり Yumiri Hanamori)
Xenon (CV:関智一 Tomokazu Seki)
ConneR (CV:竹内栄治 Eiji Takeuchi)
Cherry (CV:ファイルーズあい Fairouz Ai)
Nora (CV:石見舞菜香 Manaka Iwami)
Ivy (CV:河瀬茉希 Maki Kawase)
Vanessa (CV:楠木ともり Tomori Kusunoki)
Rin (CV:能登麻美子 Mamiko Noto)

If you discover during the authentication period that your IAP was lost due to your device not connecting to the internet, 
please make sure your device is connected to the internet. Afterwards, click "Restore Purchases" to recover your IAP.
*************************************************************

※ This game contains additional in-app purchases. Please purchased base on personal interest and ability. Do not overspend.

tr.description:
'Call of Knights' is a pixel-style RPG card game developed by Olive Panda Studio. The game consists of two main parts: 'Song of the Knights' and 'Shining Stars' . Players can access the full game content through free download and optional in-app purchases.




【In-App Purchases】

Full Content Unlock: $8.99 USD
Story Mode of 'Song of the Knight': $4.99 USD
Free Mode of 'Shining Stars': $4.99 USD
Both modes support free trial before purchase. 
'Song of the Knights' can be played for free up to the end of Chapter 2, while 'Shining Stars' can be experienced freely for one in-game year.
Note: Prices may vary depending on local exchange rates.




Song of the Knights:
This story mode is adapted from Nobel Prize-winning author Henryk Sienkiewicz's 'The Teutonic Knights'. The gameplay combines card-based battles with RPG character development, featuring a companion skill combo system where different cards trigger unique partner skills, allowing players to build various strategic decks. Along the journey, players will meet and recruit many companions, embarking on a grand and epic adventure.




Shining Stars:

Set in the magical continent of Antana, this mode features six culturally distinct nations. Players take on the role of a minor lord from one of the kingdoms. As the demon realm prepares to invade, players must travel the land, recruit companions, form their own knight order, and grow stronger to defend the front lines of humanity.




【Device Support】
iOS 10.0 or later
Devices with 3GB RAM or more
iPhone 7 or newer
iPad Air 3 or newer





【Contact Us】
If you need help during the game or encounter any issues, feel free to contact us via email.
Official Email: knight@longyougame.com

With Image Eraser, you can remove undesirable objects from your images, such as power lines, people, logos, watermarks, text or any other undesired artifacts as easy as taking a shot itself.

pt.description:
A vida no Pequeno Planeta era tranquila e despreocupada até que ocorreu um grande desastre - o planeta sofreu o impacto de um meteorito! O mundo desmoronou e agora o seu futuro depende apenas de ti! Utiliza a tua imaginação e criatividade: para restaurar o Pequeno Planeta e ajudar os seus habitantes terás que reparar uma variedade de máquinas e mecanismos assim como resolver quebra-cabeças em cada um dos cinco capítulos deste jogo. A navegação é simples e intuitiva. Não te distrai dos enigmas desafiadores e poderás viver por completo a atmosfera única do jogo.
 
* Não há qualquer texto neste jogo. É divertido para todas as idades e adequado para toda a família!

* Um mundo brilhante e deslumbrante criado totalmente à mão

pt.description:
CAT QUEST II é um RPG de ação de mundo aberto 2D em um reino fantástico de cães e gatos. Sob a ameaça de uma guerra contínua entre os gatos de Felingard e as forças do Império de Lupus, CAT QUEST II conta a história de dois reis, unidos contra suas vontades, em uma jornada repleta de descobertas miauravilhosas para reclamar seus tronos.
Jogue como cão e gato e explore os reinos sozinho ou com seus amigos! Aventure-se em um mundo repleto de magia e monstros esquisitos e embarque nessa miauventura única!

Com o sucesso do aclamado CAT QUEST, os Gentlebros voltam ao mundo de Felingard para superar a experiência do primeiro jogo, com mais magias explosivas, opções de armas mais abrangentes, uma mecânica de alternância de personagens fantástica e modo cooperativo local!
Experimente
- Uma história inédita no mundo de Felingard — e novos locais!
- Novas mecânicas de alternância e cooperação. Jogue como gato e cão, sozinho ou com seus amigos!
- Novos tipos de armas – Torne-se um mestre de espadas, cajados e muito mais e seja um guerreiro foformidável!
- Mais magias para miaussacrar seus inimigos.
- Novas habilidades passivas, com atributos que podem ser misturados e combinados em possibilidades infinitas!
- Masmorras emocionantes e diversificadas com novas armadilhas e obstáculos, garantindo que cada aventura seja cheia de descobertas inéditas!
- Embarque em inumeráveis missões secundárias, cada uma com sua história única que expande o universo e a mitologia de CAT QUEST!

Comece hoje sua grandiosa miauventura!

pt.description:
Train your brain to listen carefully with this professional speech therapy app. Three activities help you to understand sentences, follow directions, and improve language processing. If you’re looking for a speech therapy app for adults and older children with communication and cognitive impairments that takes understanding beyond single words, this app is for you. 

** Try for FREE by downloading Advanced Language Therapy Lite **

Advanced Comprehension Therapy will help you find where comprehension breaks down, then help you build it back up with 3 classic speech therapy activities targeting sentence-level listening and reading comprehension.

1) IDENTIFY the picture that matches the sentence, increasing in syntactic complexity. Start by finding the picture that matches a sentence like “The baby sleeps.” Work up to finding “The grandparent is told a secret by the child” from closely related pictures.

* 11 levels of difficulty for understanding sentences with nearly 700 unique trials
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes up to 3 nouns, indirect objects, reversible sentences, & passives

2) BUILD a sentence by focusing on each word & how they all fit together. Arrange the words one-by-one to match the pictured sentence you hear. Start with 3 words and work up to 9.

* 20 sentence types in nearly 1200 unique trials
* Add up to 3 extra words for an added challenge
* Tricky "little words" like articles, pronouns, and prepositions
* Hear each word as you touch it

3) FOLLOW directions of increasing difficulty in 1-, 2-, & 3-step commands. Start with exercises like “Touch the pencil.” Work up to brain-bending challenges like “Before you touch the large yellow striped circle, touch the small blue solid star.” 

* 16 levels of difficulty for following directions
* Listen, Read, & Both modes to focus on auditory, reading, or total comprehension
* Includes basic, temporal, & conditional commands in a hierarchy of 1-, 2-, & 3-step directions

In All Activities:

* Enjoy 1000’s of unique stimuli with hundreds of photos
* Use hints when you get stuck so you always finish successfully
* Track progress with detailed e-mail reports 
* Record yourself on-screen and send it when you’re finished
* Repeat audio at any time, or repeat slowly for easier understanding
* Designed with adults in mind but easy enough for children to use 
* No subscriptions, no monthly bills, no Wi-Fi needed

-------------------------------------------------
Who is Advanced Comprehension Therapy For?

* Speech-Language Pathologists
* Adults with Aphasia (mild-moderate)
* Stroke & TBI Survivors
* Children with Autism or Language Learning Difficulties
* Anyone who has mastered the single words in Comprehension Therapy or Language 4-in-1 & wants to take their therapy to the next level!

-------------------------------------------------
Which Skills Does This App Target?

* Auditory Comprehension (listening)
* Reading Comprehension 
* Attention to Detail
* Working Memory (holding information)
* Nouns & Pronouns (he/she/it/they)
* Adjectives (colors, size, shading)
* Syntactic Processing (understanding grammar)
* Temporal Concepts (before/after)
* Conditional Directions (if/then)
* Problem Solving (using hint/repeat or fixing errors)

-------------------------------------------------
Download now to get started – or try it for FREE with Advanced Language Therapy Lite!

Looking for something different in a speech therapy app? We offer a wide range to choose from. Find the right one for you at tactustherapy.com/find

Apenas três segundos por item. Rápido, Seguro e Fácil de usar, esse é o nosso objetivo, e também através da Central de Notificações do iOS. 

Apple Watch:

Recurso:

◎ Senha de segurança: Ninguém pode abrir, somente você. Mesmo apertando duas vezes o botão início, na lista de Apps não podemos ver os dados
◎ Suporta mais de 160 tipos de moedas, faz a atualização e a conversão do câmbio de forma automática
◎ Calculadora: Calculadora embutida, mais conveniência e rapidez

pt.description: The table features the player as a member of a space fleet that completes missions to increase rank. Players can attain nine different ranks (listed from lowest to highest): Cadet, Ensign, Lieutenant, Captain, LT Commander, Commander, Commodore, Admiral, and Fleet Admiral. Players accept a mission by hitting "mission targets" which select which mission they will take, and by going up the "launch ramp". Each mission has a set number of things for players to do, such as hitting the "attack bumpers" (which are a set of four bumpers at the top of the table) eight times (this is the "target practice" mission). Some missions involve a number of steps which must be completed in sequence. Missions end either by being completed, or by being aborted due to running out of "fuel", as indicated by the lights in the passage that passes under the launch ramp. The "fuel" lights go out one by one at a time interval, and can be re-lit by having the ball go over them, or all at once by going up the launch ramp again. Upon completing a mission, some of the blue lights in a circle in the middle of the table turn on. When all of the lights in the blue circle turn on, the player's rank increases, and a light in the orange circle turns on.
